ksa_text: Knowledge of data privacy and minimization principles as operational data quality practices, including purpose limitation, consent management, legitimate interest assessment, data retention constraints, and personal data protection requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data quality", "data retention"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3965); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
